creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

  This port is based on archivers/unzip 5.52. Recently archivers/unzip
  has been updated to 6.0 with iconv support. I would like to ask if
  archivers/unzip provide the same functionality as this new port?
  Thanks.

Regards,
sunpoet
-- 
          4096R/CC57E36B 8AD8 68F2 7D2B 0A10 7E9B  8CC0 DC44 247E CC57 E36B
  Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet at sunpoet.net>, <sunpoet at FreeBSD.org>
